# Copilot Instructions

## Language

- **English is the default language** for all code, comments, docstrings, commit messages, README files, and any other documentation in this repository.
- Variable names, function names, class names, and identifiers must be in English.
- Inline comments and docstrings must be written in English.
- Markdown documentation files (README, instructions, changelogs, etc.) must be written in English.
- User-facing strings and UI labels are exempt — they follow the i18n files under `frontend-client/src/i18n/`.

## Agents

- Whenever a new agent is added to `backend/app/agent/`, always update `README.md` to document it: include its name, purpose, and any relevant configuration or dependencies.
